titleStmt.title: SII 30.33: original edition by N. Marxia Gandhi, A. Padmavathy and S. Swaminathan
No. 33. (A.R. No. 110 of 1915.) Tirumurugaṉpūṇḍi, Avinashi Taluk, Coimbatore District Muruganātha Temple-on the south wall of the same maṇḍapa Vīkrama-Chōḻa: Year 3: 1276 A.D.

summary.p: It records the decision taken by Chitramēḻi-periyanāṭṭār of Vaḍaparisāra-nāḍu and the nāṭṭār of Pūluva-nāḍu. According by the families which remit elavai must supply one kuṟuṇi, and the farmers of Pūluva-nāḍu were to supply four nāḻi of millet to the temple of Tirumurugaṉpūṇḍi-nāyanār.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . vikkiramacoḻatevaṟku yāṇṭu muṉṟāvatu vaṭaparicāra nāṭṭil cittirameḻip periyanāṭṭomum pūluva nāṭṭomum Emmi(l)licaintu Āḷuṭaiyar tirumu
rukanpūṇṭi nāyanāṟku nāṅkaḷ piccai kuṭuttapaṭiyāvatu koḷḷa nāṭṭil Elavai Iṟukkum kuṭikaḷ Inṟukku Aḷakkuṅ karaipponnāṭu nāḻiyāl kuṟuṇi
Aḷantu varuvomākavum pūluva nāṭṭu Uḻavukuṭikaḷ Onṟukku periyanāṭu nāḻiyāl nānāḻi kaṇpuRead- kampuAḷantu varuvomākavum IkkaṇpuRead- kamputaṇṭum Aṭiyārkaḷukku paṭiyum viṭu
Āreṉumetu vilaṅkiṭuva nammil Oruvaṟ Allatākavum Itu cempilu
Digital edition of SII 30.33 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
